creator: diario202@outlook.com
text:
I suggest an exp-run, since yt-dlp 2024.07.01 fixes 2 CVEs:

Properly sanitize file-extension to prevent file system modification and RCE:
https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/security/advisories/GHSA-79w7-vh3h-8g4j 
https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-10123

Disallow unsafe extensions: 
CVE-2024-38519 
https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/commit/5ce582448ececb8d
9c30c8c31f58330090ced03a
